title: verilator generates bad C++ with --public for real module parameters

features.name: real-valued module parameters
features.description: Code should include module parameters with real (floating-point) type
features.snippet:
parameter real DELAY_RTL = 0.0;
parameter real DELAY_GL = 0.0;

features.name: real parameter comparison in procedural combinational logic
features.description: Code should include real-valued module parameters used in comparison operations within always @(*) procedural blocks

features.name: delay parameter in procedural timing control
features.description: Code should include module parameters used as delay values in procedural timing controls within combinational logic
